name: Pasta with Spinach and Tomato Cream Sauce
recipeIngredient: 1 Container Fat-free Cream Cheese, most of it not all
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil. Add the pasta and cook until al dente. Drain thoroughly and set aside.
2. In a microwave-safe bowl, heat the frozen spinach in 30-second intervals until thawed. Drain any excess liquid.
3. In a large pot, melt most of the cream cheese over medium-low heat. Stir in the drained spinach.
4. Add the chopped tomatoes and continue to stir until well combined and heated through.
5. Mix the sauce into the cooked pasta, adding pepper and herbs. Toss everything together until evenly coated.
6. Serve hot.
